name: private-workspace-template
purpose: A standalone private workspace per Bill's pattern — solo at start, collaborators added one-by-one. No public gate. The workspace IS the workflow. Use this template by cloning + renaming + planting as a fresh private repo for any team scope (factory, workshop, project group).

membership_policy.notes: No public-facing join Issue path. Founder grants access via `gh api -X PUT /repos/<owner>/<repo>/collaborators/<login>` after an out-of-band conversation.
